title: Floating Scroll Friend
bio: Parchment Peep is a floating scroll friend who unrolls when someone needs a gentle reminder. They feel earnest, keeps ribbon knots tidy, and whispers tiny spells in curly handwriting.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw a wide rounded rectangle for the scroll paper. Add a curled roll shape on each side.
steps.hint: Use simple tubes for the curled ends, like two tiny cinnamon rolls.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, place two small eyes near the center of the paper. Add worried eyebrows and a tiny helpful smile.
steps.hint: Keep the face centered so the scroll feels friendly and readable.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add a few curly writing lines, a ribbon knot, cheek dots, little stars, and soft floating motion marks.
steps.hint: Writing lines can be simple waves, not real words.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the scroll paper, curled ends, face, writing lines, ribbon knot, cheeks, stars, and motion marks.
steps.hint: Make the paper edges slightly wavy so the scroll feels old and cozy.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the paper, ribbon, cheeks, and stars. Add soft shadows under the curled ends and a floating shadow below.
steps.hint: A little shadow inside each curl helps the scroll ends look rolled.
